rationale: #2223 was closed 2026-04-29 as fixed; #2234 reports the same caret drift in 1.6.1, suggesting incomplete fix or reoccurrence rather than a distinct duplicate.

candidate_title: Consider implementing an alternative to selectize.js
rationale: Both issues request replacing shiny's selectize.js dependency; #4227 (filed June 2025) explicitly mentions Tom Select as one candidate, covering the same ground as #4330 (filed December 2025) which focuses specifically on Tom Select.

candidate_title: input_code_editor(): caret drifts right of actual insertion point while typing
rationale: Identical reprex and symptom as #1303, which was closed by PR #1304 (added `.prism-code-editor` to the font-family selector to stop prism themes from overriding bslib's monospace font). #1332 reproduces on a fresh dev build (bslib 0.11.0.9000, commit 996f77e) that already contains #1304's fix, using the default theme (no `theme=` argument), so the merged fix did not fully resolve the underlying caret-drift defect.
